Scarlet/Violet Gym Leaders, Team Star Bosses & Elite Four

	Pokémon Scarlet and Violet, as many games before, include gym leaders and an Elite Four. With the game being open world the gyms can be tackled in any order - however the levels do not scale and so there is still a natural order to them.

A new feature of Scarlet/Violet is the Starfall Street strand, where the player takes on Team Star, a group of rebellious students. Each squad of Team Star focuses on a certain type and has a boss, similar to gym leaders. After defeating the Pokémon (as shown below), the Starmobile must also be defeated.

Gym Leaders and Team Star Bosses can be fought again post-game, however the Elite Four cannot.

### Gym Leaders
[Katy](#gym-1) (Cortondo)[Brassius](#gym-2) (Artazon)[Iono](#gym-3) (Levincia)[Kofu](#gym-4) (Cascarrafa)[Larry](#gym-5) (Medali)[Ryme](#gym-6) (Montenevera)[Tulip](#gym-7) (Alfornada)[Grusha](#gym-8) (Glaseado Mountain)
### Team Star Bosses
[Giacomo](#teamstar-1)[Mela](#teamstar-2)[Atticus](#teamstar-3)[Ortega](#teamstar-4)[Eri](#teamstar-5)
### Elite Four
[Rika](#elite4-1)[Poppy](#elite4-2)[Larry](#elite4-3)[Hassel](#elite4-4)[Geeta](#champion-5)[Other trainers](#trainers-misc)
